hero_headline: Casa del Mar — Seafront Villa with Private Pool in Sitges

highlights.text: Sleeps up to 6 guests across 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms.
Rated 4.96 out of 5 across 87 reviews — guests consistently praise the sea views and spotless pool.
Steps from the marina and a short walk to the old town.
Full refund available up to 30 days before arrival.

about_section: This bright three-bedroom villa sits right on the seafront in Sitges, Spain, with the marina just outside your door and the old town a ten-minute stroll away. Wake up to sea views, cool off in your private pool, and enjoy the ease of free on-site parking. With space for up to 6 guests and a 4.96-star rating from 87 reviews, the area has won over visitors time and again.

amenity_descriptions.text: A private pool exclusively for guests — perfect for cooling off on warm days.
Air conditioning keeps every room comfortable, especially welcome during the summer months.
Broadband internet keeps you connected throughout your stay.
A dishwasher makes tidying up after meals effortless.
Free on-site parking means one less thing to worry about on arrival.
